sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112136" key="formorrafi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορμο-ρρᾰφίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112136.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">needle for sewing mats with,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:18:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
